source_anchor: 2026-03-12 - Systemic Crop Year Format Mismatch (6 Competing Implementations)
scenario: A crop year format split across utilities, Edge Functions, and tables survived because the agent workflow did not force a convention consistency audit across all code paths.
expected_findings: Convention-audit language was missing, weak, or too easy to skip.
Cross-table join format checks were not explicit enough.
The agent did not force a full grep across duplicate implementations.
expected_patch_focus: Add a mandatory convention consistency procedure.
Require grep across all implementations when shared formats change.
Promote cross-table join checks into a first-class verification step.

replay_plan.failed_slice: Replay a shared format change that touches utilities, Edge Functions, and multiple tables.
replay_plan.near_neighbor: Replay a metric-name change that requires the same cross-codebase sweep.
replay_plan.canary: Replay a local UI-only copy change that should not trigger the convention audit.
